OpenAPI description of the public REST API for rubygems.org, the Ruby community's gem hosting service. Covers the v1 surface documented at https://guides.rubygems.org/rubygems-org-api/ and the v2 versions endpoint documented at https://guides.rubygems.org/rubygems-org-api-v2/.
